title: Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
